news_summary: HRANA reported 1,190 killed (436 civilians, 435 military, 319 unconfirmed) and 4,475 injured in the Iran-Israel Twelve-Day War as of 28 June 2025.

news_headline: Iran raises official death toll to 1,060 (Health Ministry / AP)
news_summary: Iranian Ministry of Health raised the official war death toll to 1,060 with 4,000+ wounded; AP reported the figure on 8 July 2025.
citation_text: AP: Iran raised official death toll from war with Israel to 1,060 (8 July 2025).

news_headline: Top Iranian commanders killed in Tehran strike
news_summary: Israeli strike on a Tehran command center killed IRGC leadership including Mohammad Bagheri, Hossein Salami, Amir Ali Hajizadeh and Gholam Ali Rashid.
citation_text: ACLED/HRANA: strike killed most of IRGC Aerospace Force leadership and senior commanders.
notes: Linked to EVT-003; persons rows per_1..per_4.

news_headline: Nearly 360 Israeli strikes across 27 Iranian provinces
news_summary: ACLED recorded nearly 360 Israeli attacks across 27 Iranian provinces over 12 days, with over 150 strikes on military targets.
citation_text: ACLED Iran war updates: ~360 Israeli attacks across 27 provinces.
